inline_comments.message:
I think we try to keep commit titles in the imperative mood
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imperative_mood

so I guess it would be something like:
Change log level for telemetry file from INFO to Debug
Is this the correct Jira or would there be further changes to completely close this Jira?
There will be further changes including case from jira. We treat DCAEGEN2-1958 as simply adjust log level so that user can easily know what is going one.

I'm merging this, however, in the future if your intent is to do more activity for a specific Jira, especially when the activity has such a common theme, it's probably better to do it in fewer commits. This is a very small commit probably should have done a more generic "log correction" commit that sweeps multiple packages rather than having a commit that has a net 9 character change, that doesn't result in the referenced Jira getting closed.
